title: VISCAL 6Pcs Squeaky Dog Ball, Dog Toys for Teeth Cleaning, Interactive Pet Training Ball for Dogs and Puppies, Multicoloured, Medium Breed Sizes
features: Package Include: 6Pcs Squeaky Dog Ball, each size is 6.5x6.5cm, each weight is 53g. 6 kinds of colors: 1X yellow blue, 1X red blue, 1X green purple, 1X red green, 1X orange blue, 1X red yellow.

Durable and Safe: Our toy balls for dogs are made of premium TPR thermoplastic elastic rubber, safe and non-toxic, strong and bite-resistant yet lightweight, with good elasticity to float on water. Ideal for owners and dogs to do interactive games.

Unique Design: The double color matching design of our toy balls for dogs makes it more fun for dogs to play. The raised particles design can effectively help dog to clean teeth and eliminate tongue coating bacteria and can prevent the dog from dropping and swallowing during chewing. The built-in sound device keeps your pet active and excited as they play, providing your pet enrichment, entertainment, attracting the dog's attention and reducing their anxiety, boredom and destructive behavior.

Perfect Gift: The toy balls for Dogs is an ideal gift for the dog.It can help the dog and owner establish a tacit bond with each other through interaction. Such as throwing it far away for the dog to pick up, so that it not only increase the reaction speed of the dog and make the dog more agile, but also enhance interaction and emotion between you and your dog.

Friendly Reminder: Our 6Pcs squeaky dog ball usually have an odour due to the material they are made from. If your pet is very sensitive to the smell of rubber toys, you may wish to consider choosing an odourless or low odour rubber toy. If any problem, please cantact us, we will reply as soon as possible.
description: Product Description 6Pcs Squeaky Dog Balls These Squeaky Dog Balls combine your dog’s two favorites, squeaky sounds and bouncy balls, they are ideal for tossing and fetching games, creating a happy and interesting time for you and your pets. Good Quality Our 6Pcs Dog Balls are made of premium material,which is strong, bite-resistant and lightweight with good elasticity. Dogs can play whole day. Unique Design The two-color design of squeaky dog balls makes it more fun for dogs to play with light bite sound. The raised surface design can effectively clean the tongue coating. Suitable for dogs of various body types. Interactive Dog Balls These Interactive Dog Balls are designed to make dogs more active and happier, helping dogs reduce anxiety and boredom, and stay happy and healthy. Our 6Pcs Squeaky Dog Balls allow you to play with your dog, help release the dog's stress, and develops the dog's trust and understanding. Strengthen the bond between you and your lovely pet. Notice Please wash and dry before and after use to keep it clean
